info.title: AiCodeCompiler.Cli
info.description: Compiles C# solutions into AI-agent-friendly markdown documentation

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
AI Code Compiler — Compiles C# solutions into structured documentation and exposes it via an MCP server for AI coding agents.

Commands:
  compile    Compile a C# solution (default when no command specified)
  watch      Watch for file changes and auto-recompile
  mcp        Start the MCP server for agent queries

Examples:
  compile-for-ai                          Auto-detect and compile .sln in current directory
  compile-for-ai -s My.sln -v             Compile with verbose output
  compile-for-ai watch                    Watch mode — recompile on changes
  compile-for-ai mcp                      Start MCP server for .codemap in current dir

After compiling, an MCP server is registered in .vscode/mcp.json so AI agents
can query your codebase structure through tools like search_types, get_endpoints,
get_type_details, and more.

Upgrade: dotnet tool update --global AiCodeCompiler --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json

commands.name: compile
commands.description: Compile a C# solution into markdown documentation

options.name: --solution
options.description: Path to the .sln file (auto-detected if not specified)

options.name: --yes
options.description: Skip confirmation when multiple solutions are found [default: False]

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Watch for source changes and recompile automatically

options.name: --solution
options.description: Path to the .sln file (auto-detected if not specified)

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Start the MCP server for codemap queries

options.name: --codemap-dir
options.description: Path to the .codemap directory (default: .codemap in current directory)
